narrative:
Portsmouth City has 9,340 registered voters, with 61.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
